allow: Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan test:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan make:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan cache:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan config:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan route:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan view:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan key:*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan list:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan test:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan make:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan cache:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan config:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan route:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan view:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan key:*)
Bash(docker compose exec -T app php artisan list:*)

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) pnpm lint "$FILE" 1>&2 || exit 2 ;; esac
